##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=[(NH_4_)K(H_2_CO_3_)][Fe^3+^(HPO_4_)(H_2_PO_4_)(C_2_O_4_)]
##LOCALITY=Rowley mine, Maricopa County, Arizona, USA
##OWNER=Natural History Museum of Los Angeles County
##SOURCE=Tony Kampf
##DESCRIPTION=Bat-guano-related, post-mining assemblage of colourless needles or blades, associated with antipinite, aphthitalite, baryte, fluorite, hematite and quartz. Type sample, described in Kampf et al (2025)
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral is confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction and chemical analysis
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R250114
